title: Abyss Kitchen
description:
This is a survival action game in which the player becomes Ropp a chef of a beast girl who accompanies a party of adventurers and supports them with food. Be self-sufficient in the dungeon and eat whatever you can to keep from falling down from hunger and moving forward. Eat up anything that stands in your way!

Game Features• Let the party take charge of the battle!

When the party encounters a monster, it will automatically start fighting. Sometimes stray bullets will fly at you, so dodge them and collect ingredients.

• Observe the monsters and support the party from the rear!

Monsters create a gap before they perform a big move, and if you hit them with an attack at this time, you can take them down for a long time. Ask your party to perform a special move to finish them off.

• Everything he collects is foodstuff

Everything is an ingredient for Lop, from the plants she collects to the corpses of demons she dismembers. By cooking them while camping, they can be turned into sumptuous dishes. Cooking has various effects such as HP recovery and increasing attack power, so you need to judge the composition of the dungeon and serve appropriate dishes.

StoryIn a land dotted with numerous unexplored dungeons, there was a village that was severely starved. Many adventurers challenged the dungeons, but none of them brought back treasures yet because they could not procure food in the village that served as their base.

Then, a beast girl came to the village and said to the adventurers, “I can get food in the dungeon.

She said, I can get food in the dungeon and fill my stomach on the spot. This is my chance to get my hands on the treasure!

The adventure of Lop the cook begins now.
description_short: Abyss Kitchen is a survival action game in which you play the role of Lop a cook who accompanies a party of adventurers, and guides them with the power of food. Feed yourself in the dungeon and eat whatever you can to keep from starving and falling down. Eat up anything that stands in your way!
